# James King - Technical Lead | AI Code Governance

James King - Technical Lead specializing in AI code review, security, and compliance. 6 years delivering government services under strict WCAG AA constraints. Expert in Laravel, PHP, Symfony, Kubernetes.

## Table of Contents

- [About](about)
- [Services](services)

- [Now](now)
- [Contact](contact)

---

# About

Proven experience delivering high-compliance systems processing millions in payments. 6 years in government services under strict WCAG AA accessibility constraints.

I'm James King, a Chief Technical Officer and AI Code Governance specialist based in Redditch, UK. I help teams safely adopt AI in development through rigorous code review, compliance frameworks, and governance processes.

I've written AI skills and guidelines for development teams and am a passionate advocate of test automation and secure software development practices.

## Experience

### Varsuite Media Group Ltd - Chief Technical Officer (Nov 2024 - Present)

- Took over development from a previous setup; secured and stabilized client websites, implementing security best practices
- Migrated 100+ websites from multiple hosting platforms (primarily AWS) to in-house hosting, reducing hosting costs by ~70% and improving reliability
- Introduced development standards: coding conventions, code review process, and client issue reporting workflows
- Established new site onboarding process for clients joining the agency
- Led technical delivery across all production websites, ensuring 99.99% uptime
- AI Code Governance: Introduced AI tools to speed up development safely, writing team guidelines for AI-assisted coding

### Wider Plan Ltd - PHP Developer (Mar 2018 - Nov 2024)

- Developed features for Wider Plan salary sacrifice system and Gov.UK services
- Collaborated within an 8-developer team delivering government services under strict compliance and WCAG AA accessibility constraints
- Converted CI/CD pipeline from legacy Jenkins to GitHub Actions with custom runner VMs
- Active code reviewer via GitHub PRs, ensuring high code quality and test coverage
- Maintained large Symfony codebase supporting payment systems processing millions
- Devised automated tests in PHPUnit: Acceptance, Feature and Unit testing

### Just Checking Ltd - Senior Developer (May 2015 - Mar 2018)

- Promoted from Web Application Developer to Senior Developer (November 2016)
- Mentored Junior Developers who went on to become Senior Developers
- Delivered full-stack features end-to-end for prototype projects and main application
- Created development tooling for a legacy platform
- Migrated from Microsoft SQL Server to PostgreSQL and Windows Server to Ubuntu

### Real Point Design Ltd - Temporary Web Developer (May 2014 - Oct 2014)

- Delivered full-stack features end-to-end for Laravel systems
- Worked on projects including a major BBC project
- Established coding standards and way of working with Laravel
- CentOS system administration for cloud servers

### Trakware Solutions Ltd - Junior Web Developer (May 2013 - May 2014)

- Industrial placement during University
- Set up open source on GitHub for in-house JavaScript framework
- Managed AWS cloud services
- Delivered full-stack features and bug fixes

# Services

Human-led services for companies looking to level up their development. No AI can replace the nuance of experienced human judgment.

Rates: Available upon request. All projects start with a free consultation to understand your needs.

## AI Code Review (Day rate or fixed project)

Review AI-generated code for security issues, compliance problems, and technical debt. With AI becoming ubiquitous in development, someone needs to be the human checkpoint.

- Security vulnerability detection in AI-generated code
- Compliance checking against industry standards
- Technical debt identification and remediation
- Code quality assessment and best practices
- Review of AI prompts and outputs for accuracy
- Establishing AI code review processes for teams

## Technical Consulting (Day rate or retainer available)

Technical advice for projects and development processes. I help companies make better technical decisions without the overhead of hiring a full-time CTO.

- Architecture design and technical strategy
- Technology stack selection and evaluation
- Development process optimization
- Team workflow and tooling recommendations
- Technical risk assessment
- Codebase auditing and improvement plans

## DevOps & Infrastructure (Fixed project or day rate)

Cloud infrastructure and deployment pipeline setup. I help teams achieve reliable, scalable deployments with minimal friction.

- Kubernetes cluster setup and management
- CI/CD pipeline implementation
- Infrastructure-as-code with Terraform
- Cloud migration and cost optimization
- Zero-downtime deployment strategies
- Monitoring and alerting setup

## Team Mentorship (Monthly retainer - recurring)

Mentoring developers to level up their skills. I help junior developers become seniors and seniors become leaders.

- One-on-one mentoring sessions
- Code review best practices training
- Test-driven development education
- AI tool adoption guidance for teams
- Career development advice
- Technical interview preparation

## Security Audits (Fixed project)

Comprehensive security reviews for web applications. I help identify vulnerabilities before the bad guys do.

- OWASP vulnerability assessment
- Authentication and authorization review
- Database security auditing
- API security testing
- GDPR compliance checking
- Security hardening recommendations

---

# Projects

## Varsuite Core

Multi-tenant SaaS platform for agency site management, supporting 80+ websites. Built with Laravel 11, PHP, Kubernetes, Docker, PostgreSQL, Redis.

- Multi-tenant architecture with isolated data per client
- Automated deployment pipelines
- Billing integration with Paddle
- Advanced reporting and analytics
- Built with Laravel 11 on a scalable Kubernetes cluster using infrastructure-as-code with Terraform
- Achieved zero-downtime deployments through careful blue-green deployment strategies
- Custom WordPress plugin and Laravel composer package for integration

## jamesking.dev

This website! Built with Astro, TailwindCSS, and Tokyo Night theme.

- Tokyo Night color scheme inspired by my Omarchy Linux desktop
- JetBrains Mono font for terminal aesthetic
- Flexible blog content types (articles, notes, links, videos, questions)
- SEO-optimized with structured data
- Visual regression testing with Percy
- Automated dependency updates with Renovate

---

# Blog

## Hello World - Welcome to My New Website

Introducing my new personal website built with Astro, featuring a Tokyo Night design and flexible blog content types.

Astro is an incredible framework for static sites. It's fast, flexible, and has excellent developer experience. Perfect for a personal site that needs to be performant and easy to maintain.

The site features flexible content types:

- Articles - Long-form posts for tutorials and deep dives
- Notes - Short-form updates and quick thoughts
- Links - Link roundups (inspired by cassidoo's newsletter)
- Videos - Share interesting videos I find
- Questions - Coding interview questions

## Hey, you can now comment on my posts!

Added Giscus commenting so you can react and comment on blog posts using your GitHub account.

---

# Uses

## Desktop (Primary)

- CPU: Intel Core i7-13700K (16-core, 8P + 8E, 30MB L3 cache)
- GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080 Ti (MSI Ventus)
- Motherboard: ASRock B760M PG Lightning/D4
- RAM: 32 GB DDR4
- Storage: 1TB Seagate FireCuda 530 + 2TB Samsung 990 PRO
- Monitors: Dell U3415W (3440x1440 ultrawide) + ViewSonic VP2765 (1920x1080 vertical)
- OS: Omarchy Linux (Arch-based)
- Desktop: Hyprland (Wayland)

## Laptop

- Model: Samsung Galaxy Book 2 (NP750XED-KC3UK)
- CPU: Intel Core i5-1235U (12th Gen)
- RAM: 8 GB LPDDR4x
- Storage: 256 GB SSD
- Display: 15.6" Full HD (1920x1080)
- Graphics: Intel Iris Xe Graphics
- OS: Omarchy Linux (Arch-based)
- Desktop: Hyprland (Wayland)

## Editors & Terminal

- PHPStorm: Primary IDE for PHP/Laravel development
- Zed: Fast, collaborative code editor
- Neovim: For quick edits and config files
- Ghostty: Terminal emulator

## AI Tools

- OpenCode: AI coding assistant with Claude & Ollama models
- Claude: Code generation and review
- Ollama: Local AI models
- GitHub Copilot: Inline code suggestions

## Languages & Frameworks

- PHP: Primary backend language
- Laravel: Go-to PHP framework
- Symfony: Enterprise PHP framework
- Statamic: Flat-file CMS built on Laravel
- Astro: Static site generator (this site!)
- JavaScript: Frontend and Node.js
- React: Frontend framework
- AlpineJS: Lightweight JavaScript framework
- TailwindCSS: Styling
- CSS: Styling
- GraphQL: API query language
- JSON REST APIs: API development

## Cloud & Infrastructure

- AWS: Cloud services
- DigitalOcean: VPS and droplets
- Hetzner: Cost-effective servers
- OVH: Cloud hosting
- Civo: Cloud-native Kubernetes
- Linode: VPS hosting
- Platform.sh: Cloud PaaS
- Cloudfleet: Managed Kubernetes
- Netlify: Static site hosting
- Cloudflare: CDN and DNS
- Cloudflare R2: Object storage

## DevOps Tools

- Kubernetes: Container orchestration
- Docker: Containerization
- GitHub Actions: CI/CD
- Terraform: Infrastructure as code
- Ansible: Configuration management
- IaaS: Infrastructure as a Service
- Percy: Visual regression testing
- Sentry: Error monitoring
- Codecov: Code coverage tracking

## Database

- MySQL: Primary database
- PostgreSQL: Alternative database
- Microsoft SQL Server: Enterprise databases
- MariaDB: MySQL alternative
- SQLite: Lightweight local database
- Redis: In-memory data store
- KeyDB: High-performance Redis fork
- Valkey: Redis fork

## Other Tools

- Git: Version control
- Server Administration: Linux server management
- Test-driven Development: TDD methodology
- Pest: PHP testing framework
- PHPUnit: Testing framework
- Starship: Terminal prompt
- Fastfetch: System info display
- btop: System monitor
- Lazygit: TUI for Git
- Dotfiles: My Hyprland, Neovim & Ghostty configs
- Coding Standards: Shared PHP coding standards (Pint, PHPStan)

---

# FAQ

## What is an AI-augmented software engineer?

An AI-augmented software engineer uses AI tools like Claude, Ollama, and OpenCode to accelerate development while maintaining safety and quality. This includes AI-assisted code generation, automated code review, prompt engineering for development tasks, and writing AI skills/workflows for the team. The key is using AI as a pair programmer while maintaining human oversight for all production code.

## What's your experience with Kubernetes?

I've built scalable Kubernetes clusters using infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), achieving zero-downtime deployments. I manage clusters supporting 80+ websites in a multi-tenant SaaS platform. I'm experienced with container orchestration, service mesh, and cloud-native architecture.

## How do you handle web security?

Security is built into every project I deliver. This includes: secure authentication (OAuth, 2FA), input sanitization, parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection, CSRF protection, regular security audits, and keeping dependencies updated. I follow OWASP guidelines and ensure compliance with GDPR and other regulations.

## Can you help migrate my existing website?

Yes. I have extensive experience migrating websites - I've migrated 100+ websites from AWS to in-house hosting, reducing costs by ~70% while improving reliability. Whether it's WordPress to Laravel, or moving hosts, I can handle the full migration process while maintaining SEO and minimizing downtime.

## What's your development process?

My development process follows best practices: requirements gathering, technical specification, Agile development with sprints, code review (including AI-assisted review), comprehensive testing (Unit, Feature, Acceptance using Pest/PHPUnit), CI/CD pipeline setup, and documentation. I believe in test-driven development and automation.

## What's your role at Varsuite Media Group?

I'm the Chief Technical Officer, leading the technical direction of a website development agency producing WordPress and Laravel websites. I took over from an outsourced team, secured and stabilized client sites, and migrated 100+ websites to in-house hosting. I also introduced development standards, coding conventions, and AI tools for the team.

## What programming languages do you specialize in?

My primary expertise is in PHP and Laravel, with extensive experience in Symfony for enterprise applications. I also work with JavaScript, React, and Node.js for frontend and API development. I'm experienced with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Redis databases.

## How do you use AI in your development workflow?

I use OpenCode with Claude and Ollama models daily for code generation, but every line of AI-generated code goes through rigorous safety review before hitting production. I've written AI skills and guidelines for my team to ensure safe and effective AI-assisted development. I believe AI is a powerful pair programmer but requires human oversight.

## What's your experience with cloud infrastructure?

I've worked extensively with AWS, DigitalOcean, and Hetzner for cloud services. I've migrated 100+ websites from AWS to in-house hosting, reducing hosting costs by ~70%. I use Terraform for infrastructure-as-code and have set up scalable Kubernetes clusters with zero-downtime deployments.

## Do you do code reviews?

Yes, I offer code review services where I review AI-generated code or human-written code for security issues, compliance problems, and technical debt. I have extensive experience as an active code reviewer in enterprise environments, ensuring high code quality and test coverage.
